title: financial_summary spec
description: Canonical schema for a financial_summary slide spec. Renders a historical P&L summary with action title, navy section header bar, right-aligned numeric columns, bold subtotal rows, italic gray percentage rows, and optional row highlighting. Values are stored as pre-formatted display strings; source_refs provide the optional link back to a workbook cell for audit purposes.

template.description: Literal discriminator that identifies this spec as a financial_summary. Required for tools that dispatch by template name.

slide_number.description: Slide number shown in the footer chrome. Optional; omitted when the slide is rendered standalone.

title.description: Action title at the top of the slide (e.g., 'Addus Has Delivered Consistent Revenue Growth with Expanding Profitability'). Should be a declarative thesis, not a generic header.

subtitle.description: Optional subtitle below the action title.

section_header.description: Text shown in the navy section header bar above the table (e.g., 'Historical Financial Summary ($ in thousands)'). Renderer defaults to empty string if omitted.

headers.description: Column headers, starting with the label column (e.g., 'Metric') followed by one header per data column (e.g., 'FY2023A', 'FY2024A', '3Y CAGR'). The first header labels the metric column; the remaining headers label the numeric columns which are right-aligned.

rows.description: Data rows. Each row's values array must have exactly len(headers) - 1 entries.

source.description: Source citation line shown at the bottom of the slide. Required by the audit (check 8: required_source_line) but optional at the schema level to allow partial specs during authoring.

source_workbook.description: Optional workbook filename this spec's values were sourced from. Used by the audit layer to resolve relative source_refs.

source_sheet_default.description: Optional default sheet name. Bare cell addresses in source_refs (e.g., 'D42') are resolved against this sheet; explicit object references can override it.

label.description: Row label shown in the first column (e.g., 'Revenue', '% Growth', 'EBITDA').

values.description: Pre-formatted display strings for each data column. Must have the same length across rows and equal to len(headers) - 1. Empty string is allowed for cells intentionally left blank (e.g., no CAGR for a derived % Growth row).

style.description: Row style: 'bold' for subtotal rows (Revenue, Gross Profit, EBITDA, Net Income, Diluted EPS), 'pct' for italic-gray percentage rows (% Growth, % Margin — also indented), 'highlight' for rows drawn with a light blue background (typically EBITDA), 'normal' for plain rows.

source_refs.description: Optional parallel array of source refs, one per entry in values. Must be the same length as values when present. Ignored by the renderer; consumed by the audit layer.

unit.description: Unit declaration used by the audit's unit_mismatch check. Optional.
